programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina The Sandman
programme.desc: Employed as a Sandman, Sabrina gets into trouble dropping into other people’s dreams.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Pen Pal
programme.desc: Sabrina discovers her new pen pal witch is wanted in two realms.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Good The Bad And The Luau (Season Finale)
programme.desc: Sabrina and her aunts travel to Hawaii for a family reunion, but when they arrive, Sabrina discovers that she will not be able to enjoy herself until she solves the family secret once and for all.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Silent Movie

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Real World

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Big Sleep

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dream A Little Dreama Me
programme.desc: Her Witches License and a new student bring Sabrina a new set of challenges.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: No Place Like Home (Season Premiere)
programme.desc: Sabrina’s senior year of high school gets off to a rocky start.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Salem And Juliette
programme.desc: Sabrina helps Salem find a date for his high school reunion.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Jealousy

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Prelude To A Kiss
programme.desc: Sabrina’s new coffeehouse co-worker poses a threat to her relationship with Harvey.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Phantom Menace
programme.desc: It’s Halloween, and Sabrina is having a ghoulish time adjusting to her new job at the coffee house.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Little Orphan Hilda
programme.desc: Hilda and Zelda experience a life-changing event when they discover they are adopted.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Spoiled Rotten

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Aging Not So Gracefully
programme.desc: Sabrina goes a little overboard in her attempt to seem more mature for the attentions of a college boy.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Love Means Having To Say You’re Sorry

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Ice Station Sabrina
programme.desc: A life-threatening situation forces Sabrina to risk exposing her magic to a witch hunter.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina Nipping At Your Nose
programme.desc: When the weather outside turns frightful, the Spellman’s plan a trip to Jamaica.

programme.desc: Choosing a college literally tears Sabrina apart when she tries too hard to make everyone happy.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dreama, The Mouse

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Pilot
programme.desc: Sabrina’s Sweet 16 becomes a truly magical birthday when she discovers she’s a witch.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Alone at Home
programme.desc: Who left Terry Home Alone! Larry did. Terry and Larry test several scenes from the classic film series Home Alone.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Loves Superheros

programme.desc: We’re putting Jack Reacher to the test! The movie, the series, and the pie!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: The Harder Terry Falls

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Shark Go Boom

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Schapbo

programme.desc: Terry and Larry start off the new season testing one of the most requested films, Quigley Down Under.

programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a scene from Reindeer Games when Ben Affleck and Charlize Theron get trapped under a frozen lake.

programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a famous scene from X-men. They are attempting to see if you can split a bullet with a Katana sword.

programme.desc: Terry and Larry are going to test a famous scene from Underworld with Kate Beckensale.

programme.title: The Challenge: Derrick Steps it Up
programme.desc: One player quits the competition, the teams compete in the Chock Full of Coconuts challenge, and two veterans lock horns in the Gauntlet.

programme.title: The Challenge: We Can Work It Out
programme.desc: Another player withdraws from the competition, securing Kina's spot as rookie team captain, and Aneesa goes off on Cara.

programme.title: The Challenge: The 10,000 Pyramid
programme.desc: The rookies and veterans try to out-muscle each other in the Moving Pyramid challenge, and one player's erratic behavior makes him a target.

programme.title: The Challenge: Sloppy Seconds
programme.desc: Jodi has a meltdown as Mark and Robin's relationship heats up, things get too close for comfort in the Sponge Worthy challenge, and one player gives the bare minimum during elimination.

programme.title: The Challenge: Watching Paint Dry
programme.desc: The teams strategize to get a leg up in the Body Painters challenge, Alton gives his opponent a fair shot in the Capture the Flag elimination, and Brad and Derrick clash.

programme.title: The Challenge: The Heat is On
programme.desc: Beth and Montana's squabble destroys the veterans' morale at the Rickshaw Races challenge, and Ruthie is bested, giving rise to a new veteran team captain who puts everyone on edge.

programme.title: The Challenge: Rookie Moves
programme.desc: Both teams are on high alert after Jillian tells Kina two rookie players formed an alliance with veterans to throw challenges.

programme.title: The Challenge: Walking the Line
programme.desc: Jillian is at odds with Cara and Susie after telling Kina about the alleged alliance, and rivals Beth and Montana square off in the Reverse Tug-of-War elimination.

programme.title: The Challenge: Bucked
programme.desc: Jodi comes up with a winning strategy in the Buck-a-Neer challenge, which unexpectedly puts Syrus on the chopping block, and sparks fly between Alton and Jodi.

programme.title: The Challenge: Victory at Last
programme.desc: One team ends their losing streak at the Pull Me challenge, and things get physical when two feuding teammates face off in the Name That Coconut elimination.

programme.title: The Challenge: Tire Me Up, Tire Me Down
programme.desc: Alton struggles in the Spare Tires challenge, showing everyone he's only human, and Jeremy tries to dethrone the rookie team captain in the Capture the Flag elimination round.
programme.sub-title: Tire Me Up, Tire Me Down

programme.title: The Challenge: Mac-Beth
programme.desc: The rookies and veterans perform their best balancing acts at the Easy Does It challenge, and one team's loss comes with a silver lining when a toxic player must compete in elimination.

programme.title: The Challenge: The Good, the Brad, and the Ugly
programme.desc: The teammates create a human ladder to overcome the obstacles of The Pit challenge, and Alton's words deal a blow to Jodi's confidence when he confirms his stance on their relationship.
programme.sub-title: The Good, the Brad, and the Ugly

programme.title: The Challenge: Blind Panic
programme.desc: As the final female Gauntlet looms, one player's leadership skills come into question when she puts herself before the team.

programme.title: The Challenge: Last Men Standing
programme.desc: As the final male Gauntlet nears, Kina and Alton consider which of their teammates they might sacrifice to the Gauntlet gods, and Randy shines in the Piece by Piece challenge.

programme.title: The Challenge: Don't Bet On It
programme.desc: Derrick and Timmy duke it out in an epic final Gauntlet, and the remaining players compete in an intense three-part final elimination challenge worth $150,000.

programme.title: The Challenge: Kickin' Things Off
programme.desc: Twelve Challenge veterans meet a group of fresh faces and are given a new set of rules in Australia for a chance to win $250,000.

programme.title: The Challenge: Shark Infested Waters: The Gauntlet II Reunion
programme.desc: The teams reveal the truth about what went down in Trinidad and Tobago, including what fueled players' meltdowns and the story behind the alleged alliance between Cara, Susie and the vets.
programme.sub-title: Shark Infested Waters: The Gauntlet II Reunion

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Watch all the death-defying battles, amazing competitions and ruthless gameplay on MTV's The Challenge, where competitors deal with hell on earth—and each other—to win big bucks.
